title: COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION - 211info
text: ALLCARE HEALTH BROOKINGS OFFICE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in AllCare Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Nurse Helpline: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week (541) 471-4106 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 471-4106 Main phone (888) 460-0185 Hotline (888) 260-4297 Language Access Line Main phone (541) 471-4106 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Insurance information AREA SERVED: Curry, Jackson, and Josephine Counties and zip codes 97410 and 97442 Services: Dental Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Eye Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Non-Emergency Medical Transportation * Medicaid Recipients Pain Management * Medicaid Recipients Pharmacy Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Physician Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Specialized Information and Referral * Medicaid Recipients Substance Use Disorder Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - BABE STORE INFORMATION SERVICES - NURSE HELPLINE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
